title: Model Execution Profiles
description: Schema for defining different model execution capability profiles.

file_cap.description: Maximum number of files allowed to be edited.

diff_budget.description: Maximum number of lines allowed in the implementation diff.

domain_cap.description: Maximum number of conceptual domains this profile can handle in a single slice.

fallback_actions.description: List of actions to take if the issue exceeds the capability profile.

tool_subset.description: List of tools or capabilities allowed for this profile.
